title: B3 docker hexa-runner rebuild — node 20 baked into distroless runtime
scope: Resolve container-no-node rc=76 fault that has blocked kick infra for 6 cycles by adding node 20 + npm to hexa-runner:latest distroless image

B_3_root_cause.stated_problem: docker run --rm hexa-runner:latest which node returned empty; hive coding-agent / nexus kick TS dispatcher refused with ai_err_exit('subagent-dispatch','container-no-node') rc=76 for 6 consecutive cycles
B_3_root_cause.actual_root_cause: hexa-runner:latest is built from ~/core/hexa-lang/docker/runner/Dockerfile which uses gcr.io/distroless/cc-debian12 as the runtime base. Distroless intentionally ships no shell, no apt, no package manager — only libc / libgcc / libstdc++ / libssl. The active Dockerfile (ω-runner-7, 2026-04-26) staged tini/curl/wget/busybox-static + native_gate.so via a debian:12-slim builder stage, but had no node entry. The user-supplied snippet `RUN curl ... | bash - && apt-get install -y nodejs` cannot run in the runtime stage because distroless has no shell or apt; it must run in the builder stage and the resulting binary must be COPY'd across.
B_3_root_cause.fix_applied: Two-stage patch to ~/core/hexa-lang/docker/runner/Dockerfile (ω-runner-8, 2026-04-28). Builder stage: install nodejs 20 via NodeSource setup_20.x apt repo (curl | bash | apt-get install nodejs). Runtime stage: COPY /usr/bin/node + /usr/lib/node_modules from builder. npm/npx wrappers: distroless lacks `ln`, AND docker buildkit COPY --from dereferences cross-stage symlinks (turning them into 54-byte regular files at /usr/bin/npm, breaking the relative `require('../lib/cli.js')` resolution in npm-cli.js). Workaround: write 2-line sh wrapper scripts in the builder at /opt/npm-bin/{npm,npx} that invoke `/usr/bin/node /usr/lib/node_modules/npm/bin/{npm,npx}-cli.js "$@"`; the canonical absolute path argv[1] makes node's __dirname resolve correctly. /bin/sh in runtime is busybox (already staged in ω-runner-5), so the wrapper runs.
files_patched: ~/core/hexa-lang/docker/runner/Dockerfile (3 hunks: builder apt-add, builder symlink-stage, runtime COPY)

build_log_summary.build_command: cd ~/core/hexa-lang && docker build -t hexa-runner:latest -f docker/runner/Dockerfile --build-arg TARGETARCH=arm64 .
iteration_history: iter-1: PASS at apt-install, FAIL at COPY /usr/share/nodejs (path doesn't exist — nodesource deb only ships /usr/bin/node + /usr/lib/node_modules, no /usr/share/nodejs)
iter-2: probe builder stage, dpkg -L nodejs confirmed canonical paths (/usr/bin/node, /usr/lib/node_modules, /usr/include/node)
iter-3: PASS build, node working, npm/npx broken with `Cannot find module '../lib/cli.js'` (symlinks dereferenced by COPY)
iter-4: PASS build, all 7 verification tests PASS
build_log_summary.image_size_after: 234MB (2026-04-28 ω-runner-8; +156MB delta = 99MB node binary + 37MB npm node_modules + 20MB intermediate layers)
build_log_summary.build_duration_total_seconds: ~80s across 4 iterations (most layers cached after iter-3)

T_B3_1_which_node.verdict: PASS — original failing check now succeeds

T_B3_3_dispatcher_check.cmd: docker run --rm --entrypoint /bin/sh hexa-runner:latest -c 'command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo y || echo n'
T_B3_3_dispatcher_check.verdict: PASS — exact predicate from ~/core/hive/tool/subagent_dispatch.hexa:1536 (node_avail check that triggers rc=76) now returns 'y'; container-no-node fault is resolved

T_B3_5_hexa_entrypoint_intact.actual: HEXA — self-hosted language toolchain banner (full USAGE block)
T_B3_5_hexa_entrypoint_intact.verdict: PASS — original tini→hexa ENTRYPOINT unbroken; node addition is purely additive

T_B3_6_node_version_gate.verdict: PASS — F-B3-3 node-version-mismatch <18 falsifier NOT triggered

registry_push_status.error: push access denied, repository does not exist or may require authorization: server message: insufficient_scope: authorization failed
registry_push_status.interpretation: Default tag `hexa-runner:latest` resolves to docker.io/library/hexa-runner which requires Docker Hub auth + namespace ownership. No private registry configured in this sandbox. Image is LOCAL-ONLY on this Mac.
registry_push_status.downstream_implication: Other hosts (ubu1/ubu2/hetzner) cannot pull the rebuilt image. Per raw 91 C3 honest disclose: kick infra on remote hosts will continue to hit container-no-node rc=76 until either (a) image is built independently on each host, or (b) a private registry is provisioned and image pushed/pulled. Fix is functionally complete on Mac docker host (the mac_safe_landing route per raw 25), but does NOT close the silent-timeout failure mode on ubu1/hetzner hosts.

what_works: Mac docker hexa-runner:latest now has node 20 + npm 10
F-B3-1 (24h container-no-node observation) instantly resolved on local docker run
what_does_not_work: Registry push: insufficient_scope (no auth for docker.io/library namespace)
Remote hosts: ubu1/ubu2/hetzner still have OLD hexa-runner image (or no image); rebuilt image is not propagated

F-CL3-b 4th-orthogonal-failure-mode (silent-timeout on hetzner subagent_dispatch from 2026-04-28 hexa-weave-mk-x-transcend cycle) — NOT addressed by this fix; that's an SSH/network failure mode orthogonal to the node binary
raw_91_c3_disclosure.honest_completeness_estimate: B3 task as written is COMPLETE: Dockerfile patched, build PASS, local verification PASS. Mac kick path with HEXA_RESOLVER_FORCE_UP=0 (mac_safe_landing → docker) is unblocked. Remote-host kick paths require separate cycles (rebuild on each host OR private registry deployment).
raw_91_c3_disclosure.scope_creep_check: raw 106: kept strictly to user-stated task (Dockerfile + node + rebuild + verify). Did NOT modify subagent_dispatch.hexa, did NOT touch resolver, did NOT create scripts/build-hexa-runner-image.sh (referenced by dispatcher remedy line but not requested). All scope additions deferred to follow-up cycles.
raw_91_c3_disclosure.absorbed_predecessor_finding: F-MX-3-c falsifier from 2026-04-28 hexa-weave-mk-x-transcend cycle predicted 'kick infra failure mode #5: container-no-node persists past 6 cycles'. This cycle resolves the local-Mac axis of that falsifier. Falsifier remains PARTIALLY FIRED for remote hosts.

falsifiers_preregistered.verifier: docker buildx build --no-cache -t hexa-runner:test -f ~/core/hexa-lang/docker/runner/Dockerfile --build-arg TARGETARCH=arm64 ~/core/hexa-lang/ — should complete with 'naming to docker.io/library/hexa-runner:test done'

falsifiers_preregistered.predicate: node version inside hexa-runner:latest is <18 (would break modern hive-cli ESM imports + top-level await)
falsifiers_preregistered.verifier: docker run --rm --entrypoint /bin/sh hexa-runner:latest -c 'node -e "process.exit(process.versions.node.split(\".\")[0] >= 18 ? 0 : 1)"' — exit 0 means PASS, exit 1 fires the falsifier

dockerfile_patch.note: Patch applied to working tree. Commit deferred — user instructions require explicit commit request, and B.3 mission text did not include 'commit' verb. Patch persists in working tree ready for follow-up commit cycle.

follow_up_recommendations: Create ~/core/hexa-lang/scripts/build-hexa-runner-image.sh (referenced by subagent_dispatch.hexa:1543 as remedy text but does not exist) wrapping `cd $HEXA_LANG && docker build -t hexa-runner:latest -f docker/runner/Dockerfile --build-arg TARGETARCH=arm64 .` so future operators have a one-shot rebuild path.
Provision private registry (or use ghcr.io / ECR) for cross-host image distribution; docker.io/library namespace push is permanently blocked.
Per F-MX-3-c follow-up: rebuild image on ubu1/ubu2/hetzner independently OR establish registry-push pipeline before the next cross-host kick attempt.
Commit Dockerfile patch (held back per user-instruction commit gating).
